title: Judge swipes right on Tinder, loses ₹52 lakh to alleged honeytrap, gets domestic help to file complaint
description: A Delhi court recently denied bail to a man accused of cheating a Haryana judicial officer out of more than ₹52 lakh through an alleged honey trap that began on mobile dating app Tinder.Additional Sessions Judge Saurabh Partap Singh Laler said that the material on record prima facie reflected a pattern commonly seen in online romance scams and observed that the financial transactions in the case were “consistent with the hypothesis of a honey trap.”In November 2025, the victim-judge came into co
